Write content to file. Returns 'OK' on success.
Delete file. Returns 'OK' on success. Throws ERR if not found.
Search and replace string. Returns 'OK' on success. If no exact match is found, it may suggest a similar line using fuzzy matching. Throws ERR if ambiguous or not found.
Move/Rename path. Returns 'OK' on success. Throws ERR if origin not found.
Copy file from origin to destination. Returns 'OK' on success.
Validates if a string is a valid JSON
Ejecuta un script de Python (.py) usando el venv de Paser. Se ejecuta en el directorio del script.
Lanza una nueva instancia independiente de Paser Mini en la raíz del proyecto.
Stores a piece of information in the long-term memory graph. Use scope='tattoo' for core truths, 'fractal' for general knowledge.
Retrieves information from the long-term memory graph. No args = The Mirror effect. Use direction='next'/'prev' for narrative navigation.
Returns the current token count of the conversation history and its percentage relative to the limit.
Get the project file tree (very fast)
